---
title: "AntSciHub"
listing:
  - id: templates-list
    contents: "Templates/**/*Template.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: _listing/templates-list.ejs.md
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: title
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

## Fewell/Gadau Pogonomyrmex Aggression Experiments 2026

## Hourly images

::: {.hourly-images}
::: {.hourly-images__header}
Images are added hourly from the experiment's shared Google Drive folder.

**Newest first:** In the gallery's sort menu, select **Modified** and descending
order. Google Drive remembers the selected view for each visitor.
:::

::: {.hourly-images__frame}
<iframe
  src="https://drive.google.com/embeddedfolderview?id=1_FTjq9eCrMPpMv7LBHbXa2w8Y6Adnxjn#grid"
  title="Hourly Pogonomyrmex experiment images"
  loading="eager"
></iframe>
:::

::: {.hourly-images__footer}
[Open the full gallery in Google Drive](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1_FTjq9eCrMPpMv7LBHbXa2w8Y6Adnxjn){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm target="_blank"}
:::
:::

## Templates

These templates are maintained as reusable Quarto starting points.

::: {#templates-list}
:::
